text: RDS - Custom @ sancitio. @ st e Fills the gap between RDS and EC2 running a DB Engine ¢ RDS is fully managed - OS/Engine access is limited * DB on EC2 is self managed - but has overhead e Currently works for MS SQL and Oracle ¢ Can connect using SSH, RDP, Session Manager * RDS Custom Database Automation e ... pause to customize (so there are no disruptions) e ... Resume (full automation) for normal production usage
